title: Evangelion AMV
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion AMV             Quote Post by Dummy2837 » Mon May 06, 2024 12:10 am Hello! I have just made my first ever Evangelion AMV; I have used scenes from the anime and EoE and used the song Making Plans For Nigel by XTC, a band that Shinji wears in the show. Let me know what you think! I am very open to feedback https://youtu.be/KibfOVPUVA0

[]: Re: Evangelion AMV             Quote Post by SkyKrye » Wed May 15, 2024 6:18 am cool edit man!! I love the slow vibe, not too insane like newer amvs!! 10/10
